info.title: API
info.description: This is a Backend for Frontend (BFF) API service. The service acts as a facade and aggregation layer for multiple downstream microservices in the Gubee ecosystem. It's a stateless service that doesn't connect directly to databases but retrieves and aggregates data from other microservices.

Update a product for the current logged seller.

put.description:
Update or create price of skuId product.
                Constraints:
                 - Default price not supported 'validityPeriod'
                 - Promotion price have to be 'validityPeriod' unique, if 'validityPeriod' not informed the price of this will be used when no other has been informed.
                    In the other words:
                        the beginDt of a new price can not be within the beginDt and endDt period of an existing price and
                        the endDt must be greater than the beginDt.
                 - For update promotionPrice the 'validityPeriod' must be the same. Otherwise a new price will be created.

post.summary: Request for renew API access token
post.description:
the lifetime of token is 1 hour, so it is necessary
            to keep the root token or the new token renewed in case it receives a return 403 renew the token again,
            remembering that this API does not allow renewing tokens that are not expired, or tokens that have just been renewed.

Returns all originSkuIds of ads matching the search criteria
Receives ad IDs and returns their originSkuIds, expanding parent ads to include children
Receives a list of ad IDs and returns a map adId -> originSkuId. Ads without originSkuId or invalid IDs are omitted.

patch.summary: Partial update (PATCH) of Product scalar fields by externalId
patch.description: Atomically updates only the provided fields (name, nbm, origin, originCountry, disableIntegration). Null fields are ignored. Domain events are published (UpdatedProductEvent + Disabled/EnabledProductIntegrationEvent when applicable). Only operates on non-deleted products. Locates by externalId.

patch.summary: Partial update (PATCH) of a Variation by skuId
patch.description: Atomically updates only the provided fields (cost, ean, warrantyTime, handlingTime, dimension, name, images). Null fields are ignored. For 'images': null preserves current, [] removes all, [...] replaces atomically (localUrl/imageFileName preserved via server-side merge by url+uuid). Per-field domain events are published to Kafka. Only operates on non-deleted products.

404.description: Product/variation not found or product is deleted

patch.summary: Partial update (PATCH) of a Variation by sku
patch.description: Same behavior as patchVariationBySkuId (cost/ean/warrantyTime/handlingTime/dimension/name/images patchable, bulk-images semantics with server-side merge, per-field events) — only locates the variation by sku rather than skuId.

404.description: Product/variation not found or product is deleted

get.summary: List orders from a specific status queue
get.description: Gets the latest orders from a specific queue (e.g., 'created', 'paid'). The orders are returned repeatedly until they are acknowledged via the DELETE endpoint.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: The status of the order queue to fetch.

get.summary: List orders from a specific status queue
get.description: Gets the latest orders from a specific queue (e.g., 'created', 'paid'). The orders are returned repeatedly until they are acknowledged via the DELETE endpoint.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: The status of the order queue to fetch.

get.summary: List rejected order updates from the queue
get.description:
Get latest rejected order updates (rejected updates: 'canceled', 'shipped', 'delivered') from the last 30 days,
            the orders always return the same if you do not inform the endpoint '/queue/rejected/{orderId}' that you already read this order.
            If you want read all orders you can paginate the stream. For correct the errors call again the endpoint(canceled, shipped or delivered) that generate the error with correct payload

Redimensiona uma imagem a partir de uma URL pública e retorna o binário no formato solicitado. Use este endpoint quando quiser servir a imagem diretamente ao cliente sem armazenar o resultado em cache público.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Formato de saída: png, jpeg, webp, gif

400.description: URL inválida ou formato não suportado

get.description: Redimensiona uma imagem e retorna uma URL pública (pré-assinada, ~1h de validade) para a versão armazenada em bucket da Gubee. Use este endpoint para passar a URL diretamente para `` no frontend, sem baixar o binário no seu servidor.

200.description: URL pré-assinada para a imagem redimensionada

400.description: URL inválida ou formato não suportado
